submission.evidence: The macOS runtime, installer, verifier, restore path, sample theme, and workflow skill are present.

Final English Devpost copy is prepared in submission/devpost-project-description.md.

README and README.en.md include the unified product positioning, workflow, supported platform, runtime gate, setup, verification, restore, judge quick-test path, architecture diagram, tech stack, module ownership, and GPT-5.6/Codex usage evidence.
README provides a no-rebuild sequence for runtime gate, install, one-shot apply, verify, and restore on macOS.
